title: phyllanthus parvus
intro: Phyllanthus parvus, also known as the small leaf-flowered tree or Phyllanthus parvus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, particularly in the treatment of various liver and kidney diseases. The health benefits of Phyllanthus parvus include its ability to reduce liver toxicity, improve kidney function, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus parvus are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be consumed to support overall liver and kidney health.
